site.name: Bonyad
site.tagline: Verified construction and home-service technicians in Saudi Arabia.
site.description: A marketplace connecting customers in Saudi Arabia with verified construction and home-service technicians.

hero.headline: Find the right professional for your project
hero.subheadline: Bonyad connects you with verified architects, civil engineers, and contractors across Saudi Arabia.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search for an engineer, designer, electrician...
hero.trustBadge: Contracts verified using Absher and Nafath

services.headline: One platform. Every stage of your project.
services.subheadline: Connect customers with professionals in a clearer, smoother experience for executing projects and building reliable working relationships.
services.feature1Body: Connect with engineers and service providers whose credentials have been verified for a safer, more professional experience.
services.feature2Body: Simpler project management and communication, with clear steps to help you get more done efficiently.
services.feature3Body: A platform that connects you with the right people and helps you build reliable, long-term working relationships.
services.ctaCardTitle: Everything you need to execute your project — in one platform.
services.ctaCardBody: A comprehensive experience to find the right service providers, manage communication easily, and make clearer decisions.

browse.headline: Find the right service for your project
browse.card1Body: Get high-quality building materials with reliable delivery to keep your project moving without delay.
browse.card2Body: Manage complex projects with confidence. Coordinate between parties, control budgets, and ensure quality from planning to delivery.
browse.card3Body: Comprehensive management of your property operations, maintenance, and tenants.
browse.card4Body: Expert advice to help you plan and execute your next project with confidence.
browse.card5Body: End-to-end delivery of large construction projects with full oversight and professional coordination.

howItWorks.headline: How does it work?
howItWorks.subheadline: Choose the right service, connect with experts, and start executing easily.
howItWorks.step1Body: Describe the work needed. Add photos, location, and budget range.
howItWorks.step2Body: Receive competitive quotes. Compare prices, timelines, and past projects.
howItWorks.step3Body: Choose your expert. Sign a digital contract and deposit funds into escrow.
howItWorks.step4Body: Monitor progress milestone by milestone. Funds released only after your approval.

trust.headline: No risks. No surprises.
trust.subheadline: Hire with confidence, track with clarity, pay with security.
trust.stat120Body: Verified professional via Nafath. Every professional on Bonyad has their identity verified through the Nafath platform.
trust.contractBody: Bonyad automatically creates a structured contract including scope, price, and milestones.
trust.supportBody: Dispute resolution team. If any conflict arises, the Bonyad support team intervenes to mediate and resolve the issue.
trust.transparentTitle: Bonyad is completely transparent in every transaction.
trust.transparentBody: No hidden fees. The price you agree on with the professional is what you actually pay.
trust.stat100Body: Protected by financial guarantee. Your funds are held securely and only released after your approval at each stage.

blog.headline: Build smart. Start informed.
blog.subheadline: Guides, tips, and expert insights to help you plan your next construction project with confidence.
blog.featuredTitle: The complete guide to construction permits in Saudi Arabia
blog.featuredBody: Everything you need to know about permits, approvals, and legal requirements for construction projects in the Kingdom.
blog.post1Title: Requirements for obtaining a building permit in Saudi Arabia
blog.post1Body: Learn about the requirements and procedures needed to obtain a building permit in Saudi Arabia.
blog.post2Title: Types of paints in Saudi Arabia
blog.post2Body: A comprehensive guide to paint types and finishes used in Saudi Arabian construction projects.

startCta.headline: Start your project with confidence
startCta.body: Join thousands of customers who found their right professional through Bonyad. Reliable, transparent, and fully accountable from start to finish.

hero.proHeadline: Grow your business with continuous projects
hero.proSubheadline: Join 12,400 verified professionals on Bonyad. Submit bids on projects matching your skills and receive payments securely through escrow — with no commission.

services.headline: A platform connecting expertise with opportunities
services.subheadline: Connect professionals with the right projects in a clearer, smoother experience for executing work and building reliable client relationships.
services.ctaCardTitle: Everything you need to grow your career — in one platform.
services.ctaCardBody: A comprehensive experience to find the right projects, manage communication easily, and build your professional reputation.

howItWorks.headline: How does it work for professionals?
howItWorks.subheadline: Join the platform, submit competitive bids, and get paid securely.
howItWorks.step1Body: Build a professional profile showcasing your skills, certifications, and past work.
howItWorks.step2Body: Find projects matching your expertise and submit competitive proposals.
howItWorks.step3Body: Accept the contract digitally. Funds are held securely in escrow.
howItWorks.step4Body: Complete milestones and receive payments automatically upon approval.

pricing.headline: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subheadline: Choose the plan that fits your business. No hidden fees.

successStories.headline: Real Success Stories
successStories.subheadline: Discover how Bonyad helped professionals access better opportunities and manage their projects more efficiently.
successStories.story1Quote: Through the platform I was able to reach serious clients and manage my projects more clearly and easily. It saved me a lot of time and helped me focus on quality.
successStories.story2Quote: Using the platform gave me the ability to connect with new clients and open new creative horizons. I showcased my work easily and attracted real market attention.
successStories.story3Quote: The platform helped me organize my projects effectively. I can now track work progress and communicate with clients directly. A wonderful experience.

blog.headline: Grow your expertise. Grow your business.
blog.subheadline: Tips, guides, and insights to help professionals build stronger careers on Bonyad.
blog.featuredTitle: How top professionals on Bonyad win more projects
blog.featuredBody: Proven strategies from Bonyad's highest-rated professionals on building a compelling profile and winning competitive bids.
blog.post1Title: How to write a winning project proposal
blog.post1Body: Learn what clients look for in proposals and how to stand out from the competition.
blog.post2Title: Managing cash flow as a freelance professional
blog.post2Body: Practical tips for keeping your finances stable between projects.
blog.post3Title: Building long-term client relationships on Bonyad
blog.post3Body: How to turn one-time projects into lasting partnerships that fuel steady income.

cta.headline: Grow your business and multiply your revenue
cta.body: Unlock extra tools and features that give you an edge over competitors and fill your calendar with projects

errors.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid mobile number (digits only, 9-15 characters)
errors.phoneMust9DigitsStarting5: Enter a 9-digit Saudi mobile number starting with 5
errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.password_minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.password_uppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter
errors.password_digit: Password must include at least one digit
errors.password_special: Password must include at least one special character
errors.password_noSequence: Password cannot contain a sequence like 1234
errors.phoneAlreadyRegistered: This phone number is already registered
errors.otpInvalid: Enter a valid verification code (digits only, 4–8 characters)
errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions
